name: Photography Concepts for Beginners - 3 Basic Components

step.name: Subject
step.text: Photograph the same subject with less clutter around it. Check the edges of the frame.

step.name: Light
step.text: Move position or wait for better light. Look for shape, shadow and direction.

step.name: Composition
step.text: Change your viewpoint, distance or framing so the picture feels more intentional. Repeat this exercise with five different subjects and you will start to see which decisions make the biggest difference. Need help putting this into practice?
